div.div:
_send_command()
puts on command_queue,
blocks on response_queue.get
**for user agonistic commands

div.div:
_send_command_tagged()
creates Future; registers in
_pending_futures[user_id];
ensures response reader; awaits future
**for user specific commands

div.div:
_response_reader()
a while loop that reads response_queue;
dispatch WorkerEvent:
• media → _stream_queues
• acks/errors → _pending_futures

div.div:
worker_ipc.py — shared types (imported on both sides of the process boundary)
Command(type: CommandType, payload: CommandPayload | None, user_id: str | None)
CommandPayload = UserStepPayload | WarmupPayload | ReloadModelPayload
WorkerEvent = StepComplete | WorkerError | JoinAck | LeaveAck | ReloadAck | WarmupComplete | MediaInit | MediaChunk | MediaComplete | InitAck | ShutdownAck

switch.text: worker_ipc.py — shared types (imported on both sides of the process boundary)...

command dispatcher
gpu_worker_process() branches on

INIT / WARMUP / RELOAD_MODEL
USER_JOIN / USER_STEP / USER_LEAVE
SHUTDOWN

div.div:
Legend
■ blue client / external
■ green main-process pool/slot
(methods — italic label)
■ yellow containers (routing state)
■ red IPC primitives (mp.Queue, mp.RawArray)
Worker subprocess modules:
■ orange gpu_pool.py (dispatcher)
■ lavender video_generation.py
■ teal av_streaming.py
■ gray worker_ipc.py (shared types)
Flow:
client → pool → slot
→ _send_command(_tagged) → command_queue
→ dispatcher → generate_step()
→ stream_fmp4() → ffmpeg
→ shared_buf + response_queue
→ _response_reader → futures / stream_queues
→ client awaits (via main.py AV loop)
